candidate.completion: flirt with me before my houseplants stage an intervention.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please flirt with me before my houseplants stage an intervention.

evaluation.rationale: Fresh image and a clear comic premise, but the turn is more exaggerated situation than clean reversal. "Houseplants stage an intervention" is vivid and specific, though the sentence takes a few extra words to land and stops short of a truly sharp pivot.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
